titleStmt.title: SII 41.244: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 244. (A.R. No. 463 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Gift of 16 cows for a lamp in the temple of Tiruvālaṅgāḍuḍaiyār at Paḻaiyanūr in Paḻaiyanūr-nāḍu in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The donor was Viṟpēḍu-kiḻān Dēvagaḷnataṉ Ponnan, a merchant (vāṇigaṉ) of Antamiḻaga-perunderu in the same village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi munnākat tiripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irācarāca tevarkku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu
maṇaviṟ koṭṭattup paḻaiyanūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyanūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyanārkku Ivvūr Antamilaḻakap perunteruvil vāṇikan vaṟ
peṭu kiḻān tevakaḷnātan ponnaṉ vaitta tirunantā viḷakku Araikku viṭṭa pacu 10 6 Ip pacu patināṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu nāḷoṉ
ṟukku Arumoḻi tevanāl ney Āḻākkāka vantaney cantirātittavarai celuttakkaṭa vomākak kaikkoṇṭom
manṟāṭi puliyakkon varantaruvānum mummalaiyamāraṇanum Uḷḷiṭṭom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 41.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
